case_title: KAHSAY ASGHEDE VS. RICARDO SANCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DAVID W. WASHINGTON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-22-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASGHEDE, KAHSAY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, RICARDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-02-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-28-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-18-2011
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-06-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON AUG-02-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2011 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-02-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-05-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-19-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2011 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/21/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
